title: Race and ethnicity questions
meta-description: We ask for your race, ethnicity, and preferred language so we can make sure everyone gets the same access to health care.
bite: We ask for your race, ethnicity, and preferred language so we can make sure everyone gets the same access to health care.
excerpt: We ask for your race, ethnicity, and preferred language so we can make sure everyone gets the same access to health care. This information is confidential, and it won’t be used to help decide what health programs people are eligible for. Providing your race and ethnicity is optional, so you don’t need to answer these questions to complete your application.
content: We ask for your race, ethnicity, and preferred language so we can make sure everyone gets the same access to health care. This information is confidential, and it won’t be used to help decide what health programs people are eligible for. Providing your race and ethnicity is optional, so you don’t need to answer these questions to complete your application.
